ideation: This animation sequence depicts a factory worker's movements.  The worker will have one arm raised in a gesture of holding something overhead, while the other arm is bent as if holding something at waist height.  The sequence will show a slight shift in weight and posture to add realism. Frame 1 will show a neutral pose, while frames 2-4 show the arms moving into place and then returning to a more neutral pose. Frame 1: Both arms are down at the sides, slightly forward. Frame 2: The right arm is raised at a 45-degree angle, while the left arm is bent at the elbow (simulated by joint angles) holding something. Frame 3: The right arm stays in place, while the left arm shifts slightly, showing subtle movement. Frame 4: The right arm lowers slightly, and the left arm straightens, indicating the worker is putting something down.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely at sides, ready for work
right arm lifts a load, left arm cradles another
adjusting grip on the waist-held item
setting down the items, arms return to rest
